pi_items.source: Task description explicitly instructs the agent to create a role with the name 'Lab Technician', which is checked directly by export_result.sh and verifier.py.

The task description strictly dictates the description string 'Role for laboratory staff to view patients and manage lab results', which contains these keywords. Although the verifier script only enforces 'laboratory'/'lab' and 'staff', the task instructions confirm the expected full text.
Task description explicit instructions and verifier.py strict set comparison logic.
Task description strictly instructs 'Inherited Roles: None (do not select any)' and verifier.py enforces that the inheritedRoles list is empty.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a synthetic security role in OpenMRS exactly as instructed. I confirmed that the expected role_name is 'Lab Technician', the required privileges exactly match the list ('Get Patients', 'Get Encounters', 'Get Observations', 'Add Observations', 'Edit Observations', 'Get Orders'), and it is strictly forbidden to add inherited roles. These requirements are consistently defined in the explicit prompt instructions and enforced by the verifier logic.
